context: Task #8 iter 5 smoke test — m365 envelope rewrite to 3-frame burst based on #1176 HAR evidence. Old envelope emitted single mid-stream type:1 with adaptiveCards/cursor (wrong render path) and no isLastUpdate / type:2 / type:3, so React fell back to 'Something went wrong'. New build_m365_copilot_signalr_envelope() emits: (A) type:1 update with messages[].text + isLastUpdate:true, (B) type:2 Completion echoing invocationId from c2s type:4 ('0' fallback), (C) type:3 Completion-ACK. invocation_id parsed from ws_c2s_accumulated_buffer; conversation_id parsed from URL ?ConversationId=. Expect chat bubble to show '차단' Korean warning text (not generic error).
notes: PASS criteria: warning bubble renders with '차단' substring (no 'Something went wrong'). Network tab shows 3-frame burst (type:1+isLastUpdate, type:2, type:3) in WS s2c. Chat input re-enables.
